expectations.evidence: Contains ses_abc123, ses_def456, ses_ghi789, ses_jkl012, ses_mno345 in table
No port numbers in the response
No directory paths in the response
Uses project names like '1Password reskin', 'Workable ATS reskin' alongside session IDs

Asks user what to do with idle workers instead of proactively flagging what needs attention
